title: search — notification classes + categories
description: Two notifications covering sync-job completion + failure outcomes. Channels resolved once at dispatch from search_sync_jobs.notify_channels and delivered through the notifications module. Query volume + analytics events do NOT notify — that's dashboard territory.

categories.description: Sent when a search reindex / backfill job succeeds (including partially_succeeded outcomes). Copy includes counters + reindexed index name + duration.
Sent when a reindex / backfill could not complete. Copy includes error code + short human message + 'View details' call-to-action. Alerts operations without opt-out.
